summary: Iteration 3 backend verified end-to-end. 65/65 pytest tests passing (44 regression from iter 2 + 21 new iter-3 tests). Regression fixture updated: primary admin credential changed to susanto/admin123 and login/username assertions updated accordingly. New tests validate: multi-currency (SGD/USD/IDR) with server-computed total_price_idr on create+update+bulk, seed already carries SGD (SGP Electronics) & USD (Fortress Global) rows with populated total_price_idr; bulk-delete authz (admin+staff 200, finance+store 403, empty ids 400); Excel import forces post_to_store=false; multi-item Input Incoming Goods with per-item add_to_stock True/False (qty_remaining=0 when False) — admin+store allowed, finance 403; Incoming report filters by source=po/manual and finance can read; GRN /store/receive/bulk propagates invoice_no + receive_date to source transaction; per-item add_to_stock=false sets receipt qty_remaining=0; PATCH /store/receipts/{rid}/flags toggles add_to_stock off (qty_remaining→0) and on (restored to qty_received), and 400 when trying to turn off after consumption; erwin/erwin123 secondary admin login works.
critical_code_review_comments: _compute_idr correctly forces exchange_rate=1 when currency=IDR — good defensive default.
POST /transactions/bulk-delete uses require_write (blocks finance+store) — matches spec; returns count of actually-deleted docs even if some IDs missing (idempotent).

store_receive_bulk propagates invoice_no + receive_date via update_many on touched_tx_ids — clean; note this OVERWRITES any prior invoice_no on the source transaction if a new one is sent. That is expected per iteration spec but may surprise if the same PO is received in multiple partial batches with different invoice_nos.

PATCH /store/receipts/{rid}/flags toggle-on restores qty_remaining to qty_received (not qty_received - consumed). Currently only reachable when consumed==0 (since toggle-off is blocked after consumption), so it's safe, but if a future path allows toggling off first then consuming, the restore logic would need to subtract prior consumption. Not blocking today.

Excel import hardcodes currency='IDR', exchange_rate=1.0 (line 489-490 of transactions.py) — matches spec (no currency in Excel template). If future template gains a currency column, remember to wire it.
routers/store.py is now ~810 lines. Consider splitting into store/receipts.py + store/issuances.py + store/requests.py in a future refactor iteration (still not blocking).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — updated admin fixture to susanto/admin123; added erwin fixture; updated seed-user assertion; added 5 new test classes: TestMultiCurrency (5), TestBulkDelete (5), TestImportForcesPostToStoreFalse (1), TestIncomingGoods (5), TestGRNAutoUpdate (2), TestAdminDirectToggleAddToStock (2), TestErwinAdmin (1)
test_credentials: susanto/admin123 (primary admin), erwin/erwin123 (secondary admin), staff01/staff123, store01/store123, finance01/finance123 — all working
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seed_data.py (SUSANTO+ERWIN+staff01+store01+finance01 + 8 mixed-currency transactions incl. SGD & USD). All TEST_-prefixed rows cleaned up in TestZCleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 features all pass. Test suite is in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Admin fixture uses susanto not admin. When adding tests for the remaining two batches (features 4/12 already in this batch), keep the currency, bulk-delete, incoming-goods, and GRN patterns as reference. store_receipts.source is 'po' or 'manual'; add_to_stock is bool on both PO receive and manual incoming.
rca of the issue: N/A — all features working as designed.
